author: Tiffany S.
pros: My like for this tool is basically the drag and drop features which makes work easier in creating schedules with ease.
cons: This tool has a limitation with number of integration tool as I would like them to be.

description: I improve the follow-up of the hours worked by having a validation method with specific entry and exit times. and closer communication with those in charge of payroll
author: Anthony R.
pros: With Agendrix I have been able to have my work schedules clearer with specific hours and exits and also validate my arrival and departure times to comply with my work. I really like this platform because I feel more satisfied with my schedules. I can have a correct follow-up of the extra hours worked and thus validate my information with payroll
cons: I feel satisfied and there is nothing that I dislike, it has always been a correct use and operation

author: Yann T.
pros: It is easy to use and it fits on a mobile phone
cons: It’s a little bit complicated for a new user
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Love this system, wish I had known about it sooner!
author: Patricia I.
pros: This system is a gem when it comes to it's easy operation and time saving method to accurately track your employees work time.
cons: I do not have any complaints with this system. It has made my job easier and more precise.

description: When we first implemented Agendrix, our focus was mainly on finding a scheduling platform. Agendrix helped solve many other issues that we had, such as time tracking.
author: Marianne R.
pros: I really enjoy the ease of use of Agendrix for scheduling, time tracking, time sheet approval. I have been using Agendrix since 2017 so it is really easy an intuitive to use for me. I really see how intuitive to use it is when we hire new managers. They usually pick up really fast on using Agendrix, so the training with that platform is usually quick. It is also easy for our employees to use the platform on their mobile devices.
cons: Some of the reports are hard to use for us when downloaded to xlsx. We usually have some cleaning up to do before we can use the reports and that can be time consuming, especially for accounting or human resources departments.

review_title: Great tool for scheduling our employees and keep the cost in our budget.
description: We used the free version for over 7 years, now we use the paid version, and we should have done it prior. It is a great and useful tool. Easy to use, plus we can always stay on top of the salary cost versus the projected sales.
author: Mike C.
pros: Very easy to use, plus our employees really like it. They have no excuses of not showing up to work. They receive their schedules as soon as we publicize it. As managers, we also see if the employees have seen the schedule.
cons: To me, the only part I sometimes have issues with is the availabilities of the employees, it seems to bug every now and then, but we always work around it if need be.

description: It's great. It has made it so easy for us to manage schedules, gather our employees personal information...
author: Justine V.
pros: As a team, we love the fact that a lot of things can be done from only one platform. We can manage our employee's schedules, we can consult statistics (hours, budget...). We also like the fact that our employees can volunteer for shifts. It is very easy to use and very organized: you can create different locations, roles, positions. You can also have all of your emplyee's information in their profile and you can add their personal documents to it.
cons: I don't like the fact that it's a lot less easy to use, as an administrator, on cellphone.

description: Great. The few times I did need support, I was responded to almost immediately.
author: Jamie F.
pros: Ease of use for most features within the platform. Expanding features allows you to create and use only what you need from a business prospective. 99.99% Uptime. Never offline.
cons: Vacation schedules can be fleshed out more. If an employee on a rotation is off for more than one week at a time, you can't change which shifts are calculated as an actual shift booked off.

description: Wow, it's makes our everyday job much easier.
author: mathieu M.
pros: it's easy to use and the acces to talk to someone in customers services makes it more reassuring to get the help quickly.
cons: I haven't experience nothing up to now that makes it a negative usage.

description: My experience with Agendrix is completely positive. Customer support is available in French and responds in a short time. It is easy to set up and very simple for employees to use. In addition, new functions are added each year to optimize the management of our human resources. I highly recommend it.
author: Karyne B.
pros: What I like the most with Agendrix is the ease of use. Graphics are clear and easy to use. The different layouts are fun to navigate and use for employees is simple and easy. The different human resource management options are practical and relevant. In addition, it is available in French!! It meets our needs exactly.
cons: The only thing I don't like is that the mobile version is less complete than the online application. But this is not a big problem in itself. However, it is very practical for employees who have forgotten to write down their hours when doing payroll. They can do it in real time on their cell phone.

author: Shauwn M.
pros: Schedule tracking between teams, love how responsive Agendrix staff are.
cons: Takes some time to understand every parts of the app, but so worth it!

review_title: Good platform for schedules, for them who work outside de office
description: Really good business with really fast answers and service.
author: Daniel D.
pros: Pretty easy to modify a scheduled and to have an overview of the entire week or month
cons: Id like to have more admin function in the native app

author: Amelie N.
pros: Great platform for scheduling with great features like being able to put a recurence on the shifts, the employes can submit their request and availabilities with the possibility of accepting or refusing and commenting them. It helps you see some mistakes in scheduling you could have missed.
cons: Having multiples sites and functions to manage, it would be nice to be able to have a view on only the main sites of functions I need to follow, ie. The pharmacist and the technicians without needing to have a number of resquest to manage appear which will be done by the head cosmetician or the manager.

author: Sylvie W.
pros: Salary management and exporting data to payroll provider
cons: cannot have a report for each position and how many hours each employee worked to that position

author: Louis Philippe A.
pros: TEAM support is more than awesome! Features and system friendly
cons: There is nothing really that I do not like in this system it is an important tool to have to simplify your life.

author: Brigitte E.
pros: Very clear and good . Really like it very much
cons: Nothing really , its very good, maybe they should do a template agenda

description: Make my life easyer. No more probleme with schedule, it's now simple!
author: Daphnée D.
pros: It's easy to use even for people who are not use to technologie. If we have difficulty we have fast and easy acces to support. There's always someone who caqn help.
cons: I don't have any cons. It's easy to use even for people who are not use to technologie. If we have difficulty we have fast and easy acces to support. There's always someone who caqn help.

author: Ziad A.
pros: Easy to use and communicate with your employees so everything about it
cons: Nothing seriously as I mentioned everything is easy to use

author: Edith M.
pros: team scheduling and the increased visibility
cons: - resources - no way to verify if the same resource already exist to avoid duplication - also adding details - scope of work as attachments for each entry - full schedule view for month on cell app - add/attach documents on app

author: Jean Francois D.
pros: Easy to use, really great custumer service. I like the app version too.
cons: They should be more open minded about custumer suggestion

description: Very satisfied. And people can have an history of there activities
author: Patrice G.
pros: The facilities to use and it help me to know exactly where are the employees each day if im out of the desk.
cons: Hum, i don't know because I don't use every module of agendrix

author: Natacha G.
pros: everything. It's so easy an user friendly :)
cons: nothing, very good application! I love it

author: Mélissa L.
pros: The product is very easy to use. The service is really good, when I have a question, someone answer me within 2 minutes.
cons: There is nothing that I don't appreciate about Agendrix.

author: Benoit P.
pros: The ease of building schedules, communication with teams. Save a lot of time and improves human ressource management.
cons: Honestly, I'm searching and I can't find anything negative.

author: Richard T.
pros: Ease of use, makes scheduling so easy to manage
cons: None so far, that i have discovered so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
